"'''Scouting the Galaxy'''" was a department of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine, written by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]], that covered various facets of ''[[Star Wars]]'' merchandise collecting.

==Contents==
{{IncompleteList|oou=1}}
*[[Star Wars Insider 23|''Star Wars Insider'' 23]] – "From 'Vadermallows' to Leia Panties"
*[[Star Wars Insider 24|''Star Wars Insider'' 24]] – "Merchandise Mysteries… and Menace!"
*[[Star Wars Insider 25|''Star Wars Insider'' 25]] – "Fanning the Flames of Fandom (Or: Have You Bagged Your ''Star Wars Insider'' Yet?)"
*[[Star Wars Insider 26|''Star Wars Insider'' 26]] – "Almost Everything You Wanted to Know... (Responses to Your Star Wars Snail Mail)"
*[[Star Wars Insider 27|''Star Wars Insider'' 27]] – "Droids, Ewoks and the Mysterious Vlix (And the Truth about 4-LOM and Zuckuss!)"
*[[Star Wars Insider 28|''Star Wars Insider'' 28]] – "Of Glowing Figures, Froot Loops and Bon Jovi (We don't make this stuff up, folks!)"
*[[Star Wars Insider 29|''Star Wars Insider'' 29]] – "Shadows of the Empire"
*[[Star Wars Insider 30|''Star Wars Insider'' 30]] – "Just Trying to (Action) Figure It All Out"
*[[Star Wars Insider 31|''Star Wars Insider'' 31]] – "Of Freebies, Wimps and Fake Fetts"
*[[Star Wars Insider 32|''Star Wars Insider'' 32]] – "Let's See: Three Goes Into Two…"
*[[Star Wars Insider 40|''Star Wars Insider'' 40]] - "Prequel Figures, Return of the Ewoks, Unclothed Leia, and Waltzing Vaders"
*[[Star Wars Insider 41|''Star Wars Insider'' 41]] - "Lunch Boxes, Patches, Comics, and the Other Basics of ''Star Wars'' Collecting"
*[[Star Wars Insider 42|''Star Wars Insider'' 42]] - "Yellow Oola, Gray-Cord Luke and the Burger Chef: A Tawdry Tale of a Hot Collectible Liberated From The Trash"
*[[Star Wars Insider 47|''Star Wars Insider'' 47]] - "All your ''Star Wars'' collecting questions answered, with a smile."
*[[Star Wars Insider 48|''Star Wars Insider'' 48]] - "All your ''Star Wars'' collecting questions answered, with Force.
*[[Star Wars Insider 49|''Star Wars Insider'' 49]] - "The Bonteous Booty of ''Empire''"
*[[Star Wars Insider 50|''Star Wars Insider'' 50]] - "All your ''Star Wars'' questions answered, with aplomb."
*[[Star Wars Insider 53|''Star Wars Insider'' 53]] - "Steve Sansweet answers the question, "Is Star Wars collecting dead?" and also…"
*[[Star Wars Insider 55|''Star Wars Insider'' 55]] - "Thought you had everything, didn't you? DIDN'T YOU?"
*[[Star Wars Insider 56|''Star Wars Insider'' 56]] - "Keep Your Eye Out for Episode IV Blueprints, But Be Mindful of…"
*[[Star Wars Insider 57|''Star Wars Insider'' 57]] - "Where in the world is the original Death Star?"
*[[Star Wars Insider 60|''Star Wars Insider'' 60]] - "Don't Worry, We Aren't Going to Touch Your Episode II Stuff…"
*[[Star Wars Insider 61|''Star Wars Insider'' 61]] - "Of ''Jedi'' and ''Revenge'', limited edition "theater" Luke, typos…"
*[[Star Wars Insider 84|''Star Wars Insider'' 84]] - "Finding a Treasure in a Used Bookstore Bin"
*[[Star Wars Insider 88|''Star Wars Insider'' 88]] - "Why Is the Dark Side So Darn Attractive?"
*[[Star Wars Insider 89|''Star Wars Insider'' 89]] - "The One That Almost Got Away!"
*[[Star Wars Insider 90|''Star Wars Insider'' 90]] - "Scumming the Galaxy, One Toy at a Time"
